issue.title: Retry transient S3 upload failures
issue.body: Intermittent 503s on large file uploads. Expected: retry 3x with exponential backoff. Affected: src/upload.py.

args.diff:
diff --git a/src/upload.py b/src/upload.py
index abc1234..def5678 100644
--- a/src/upload.py
+++ b/src/upload.py
@@ -1,8 +1,25 @@
+import time
+import logging
+
+logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
+
 def upload_file(path: str, bucket: str) -> bool:
-    return _do_upload(path, bucket)
+    for attempt in range(3):
+        try:
+            return _do_upload(path, bucket)
+        except TransientError:
+            if attempt == 2:
+                raise
+            delay = 2 ** attempt
+            logger.warning('Upload attempt %d failed, retrying in %ds', attempt + 1, delay)
+            time.sleep(delay)
+    return False
